summary: First testing iteration on Resto chalet booking platform. Backend: 42/42 pytest tests passed (100%) covering auth (customer/owner/admin), chalets CRUD + filters + homepage + slug retrieval (Arabic slugs work), bookings (create, conflict detection, accept/reject/cancel), reviews (only after accepted booking, avg_rating recompute, report, admin delete), notifications (list, mark read, mark-all-read), admin endpoints (stats, chalets, users, bookings, reviews, feature, status), RBAC enforcement, and file upload + serve through Emergent Object Storage. Frontend: Homepage loads with RTL Arabic, premium luxury design (forest green + gold). Customer phone-only login auto-registers and stores JWT. Owner register/login redirects to dashboard. Admin login at /admin/login → /admin/dashboard with stats. Chalets list page with filters renders. Chalet detail page renders by Arabic slug with gallery, share buttons (copy/Facebook/WhatsApp/TikTok/Instagram), QR dialog (renders valid QR pointing to chalet URL), booking form gated by login, reviews section. Notifications bell rendered for authenticated users.

issues: Date pickers use the browser-native HTML5 date input (placeholder mm/dd/yyyy) instead of the shadcn Calendar/Date Picker component used elsewhere in the design system. For RTL Arabic premium UI, this looks inconsistent and shows mm/dd/yyyy in English. Recommend swapping to shadcn Calendar or a localized date input.

action_items: (Optional UX polish) Replace native HTML5 date inputs in ChaletsList filters and ChaletDetail booking form with shadcn Calendar / localized RTL date picker for visual consistency with the luxury design system.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~780 lines — consider splitting routes into routers per resource (auth, chalets, bookings, reviews, admin) if it continues to grow beyond ~1k lines.

On admin login startup the password is always re-hashed/overwritten on every server boot (lines 95-98). This is intentional per comment but means a hot reload after manual password change will revert it; acceptable since admin creds come from env.

create_review_after_accept only allows reviews when the customer has an ACCEPTED booking. A more typical rule is to require a COMPLETED booking (check_out date in past). Current behavior is documented and tested, but worth confirming with product.
/api/files/{path} performs no authorization — any one with the storage path can fetch. Acceptable for public chalet images; flagged for awareness if files later contain private docs.
/api/admin/chalets/{id}/feature uses query parameters for boolean state (POST with ?featured=true). Works, but a JSON body would be more conventional.
_id is correctly stripped (find with projection {"_id":0}) in all list/get endpoints — no Mongo ObjectId leakage observed.

All endpoints use env vars (no hardcoded URLs/secrets). REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is used by frontend. data-testid attributes are present on all interactive elements (verified on Home, Login, OwnerRegister, AdminLogin, ChaletDetail).
test_credentials: Admin: meanarfa2012@gmail.com / maen1029384756. Customer phone-only (auto-register on any phone). Owners must register via /owner/register (test file uses uuid-generated TEST_ emails).
seed_data_creation: Tests create per-run TEST_-prefixed owners (unique email per uuid suffix), one chalet, one customer (phone 05000xxxxx), one booking, one review; cleanup at end of suite cancels booking and deletes chalet. Two extra owners and one chalet were created via UI tests and left behind (small footprint).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py runs with `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml` and is fully passing. The chalet-detail UI testids are: chalet-detail, share-copy-btn, share-facebook, share-whatsapp, share-tiktok, share-instagram, show-qr-btn, booking-form, booking-checkin, booking-checkout, booking-guests, booking-notes, booking-submit-btn. Owner register form testids: owner-name, owner-phone, owner-email, owner-password (no -input suffix). Admin login testids: admin-email, admin-password. Customer login testids: phone-input, name-input. Slugs allow Arabic + Latin; URL like /chalets/شاليه-عرض-اختبار-d010a5 works.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Only one UX-polish design recommendation about native date pickers.
